MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay ; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic,Inc. is present. Represented by Louisa Cabrera.
Attorney Margaret Dematteo appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Lawrence Bolton Jr. is present.
Attorney Elizabeth Strode representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Neil Bardack, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of April 15, 2013 vacated. (501/JPT)
